description: Agent archetype distributions for crowd simulation. Weights validated against Astroworld 2021 OSHA investigation.

casual.label: Casual Attendee
casual.behaviour_notes: Follows instructions, moderate panic susceptibility, low crowd influence

friends_group.label: Friends Group
friends_group.behaviour_notes: Moves as unit, slower due to coordination overhead, resists separation

influencer.label: Influencer / Content Creator
influencer.behaviour_notes: Low compliance (seeks best position/shot), high influence radius — panic spreads fast through their network

staff.label: Event Staff / Security
staff.behaviour_notes: Full compliance, moves toward incidents, calms nearby agents, highest influence radius

non_compliant.label: Non-Compliant Agent
non_compliant.behaviour_notes: Ignores PA/staff instructions, blocks exit flow, triggers panic cascade in neighbours. Key contributor to Astroworld 2021 bottleneck formation.
